name: Kona Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. Grease a greased 13x9 inch pan.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the butter, sugar, eggs, mashed banana, flour, baking soda, and salt until well combined.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
5. Bake for 35-40 minutes in the preheated oven, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the bread comes out clean.
6. (In a glass pan, bake for 325 degrees F for 30 minutes.)
7. The bread makes excellent muffins as well. Bake for 25 minutes in muffin tins.
8. Add chocolate chips to the batter for extra flavor and texture.
